source.eng: Terrorism

translations.en: Terrorism
translations.ja: テロリズム

source.eng: Terrorism - Evacuate, Shelter, Report what you see

translations.en: Terrorism - Evacuate, Shelter, Report what you see
translations.ja: テロリズム - 避難、安全確保、目撃情報を報告

source.eng: If You See Something, Say Something

translations.en: If You See Something, Say Something
translations.ja: 何かを目撃したら、報告してください。

source.eng: Be aware of your surroundings.

translations.en: Be aware of your surroundings.
translations.ja: 周囲に注意してください。

source.eng: Be aware of conspicuous or unusual behavior.

translations.en: Be aware of conspicuous or unusual behavior.
translations.ja: 人目に付く行動や異常な行動に注意してください。

source.eng: Report unusual items or packages to authorities.

translations.en: Report unusual items or packages to authorities.
translations.ja: 異常なアイテムやパッケージを見かけたら機関に報告してください。

source.eng: If you see what appears to be a dangerous situation, call 911 and explain your concerns to the operator.

translations.en: If you see what appears to be a dangerous situation, call 911 and explain your concerns to the operator.
translations.ja: 明らかに危険だと思われる状況に遭遇したら、911に電話し、オペレータに懸念事項を説明してください。

source.eng: The operator will help determine what actions should be taken

translations.en: The operator will help determine what actions should be taken
translations.ja: オペレータがとるべき行動を決めるお手伝いをします。

source.eng: Terrorism Incident

translations.en: Terrorism Incident
translations.ja: テロ事件

source.eng: This is an urgent emergency message. Government officals believe there has been a serious incident in [area]. Local officials are investigating the incident and accessing the damages.

translations.en: This is an urgent emergency message. Government officals believe there has been a serious incident in [area]. Local officials are investigating the incident and accessing the damages.
translations.ja: これは緊急メッセージです。政府機関によると、[area]で深刻な事件が発生したと発表されました。地元機関は事件の調査を行い、損害を確認しています。

source.eng: At this time, we do not know the cause or other details about the incident. Additional alerts will be issued as new information become available.

translations.en: At this time, we do not know the cause or other details about the incident. Additional alerts will be issued as new information become available.
translations.ja: 現時点で、事故の原因やその他詳細は不明です。新しい情報が入り次第、次の警告をします。

source.eng: Stay informed by checking local news regularly. Goverment officials will provide information about how to protect yourself and your family as it becomes available.

translations.en: Stay informed by checking local news regularly. Goverment officials will provide information about how to protect yourself and your family as it becomes available.
translations.ja: 地域速報を定期的に確認してください。政府機関から、情報が入り次第、自分の身や家族を守る方法に関する情報をお伝えします。

source.eng: What to do:

translations.en: What to do:
translations.km: អ្វីដែលត្រូវធ្វើ ៖
translations.lo: ສິ່ງທີ່ຕ້ອງເຮັດ:
translations.th: สิ่งที่ต้องทำ:
translations.ja: 緊急時の対応：

source.eng: Remain calm, and be patient.

translations.en: Remain calm, and be patient.
translations.ja: 落ち着いてください。

source.eng: A  warning to stay indoors or evacuate may be issued, please be prepare for either

translations.en: A  warning to stay indoors or evacuate may be issued, please be prepare for either
translations.ja: 屋内待機もしくは避難命令が出される場合に備えてください。

source.eng: If the event occurs near you, check for injuries, give first aid if you can.

translations.en: If the event occurs near you, check for injuries, give first aid if you can.
translations.ja: 事件が自分の周りで発生した場合は、けが人がいないかを確認し、できる場合は応急措置を行ってください。

source.eng: If the event occurs near your home, check for damages using a flashlight. Do not light matches or candles or turn on electrical switches.

translations.en: If the event occurs near your home, check for damages using a flashlight. Do not light matches or candles or turn on electrical switches.
translations.ja: 事件が自宅付近で発生した場合は、懐中電灯を使い損害状況を確認してください。マッチやろうそくは使用しないでください。まだ電化製品の電源も入れないでください。

source.eng: Shut off all damaged utilities.

translations.en: Shut off all damaged utilities.
translations.ja: 破損したガス、水道、電気は停止してください。

source.eng: Confine or secure your pets.

translations.en: Confine or secure your pets.
translations.ja: ペットはケージなどに入れてください。

source.eng: If you know of someone who is unable to understand, see or hear this message, please tell them about it.

translations.en: If you know of someone who is unable to understand, see or hear this message, please tell them about it.
translations.am: ይህንን መልእክት ለመረዳት፡ ለማየትም ሆነ ለመስማት የማይችል የሚያውቁት ሰው ካለ፡ ኣባክዎትን መልእክትቱ ኣስረድዋቸው።
translations.km: ប្រសិនបើលោកអ្នកស្គាល់បុគ្គលដែលមិនអាច យល់ មើលឃើញ ឬដឹងឮ អំពីសារនេះបានទេសូមជួយប្រាប់ពួកគេផង ។
translations.ko: 이 메시지를 이해하거나 보거나 들을 수 없는 사람을 알고 있다면, 저희에게 알리십시오.
translations.lo: ຖ້າວ່າທ່ານຮູ້ຈັກຜູ້ໃດທີ່ບໍ່ເຂົ້າໃຈ ບໍ່ໄດ້ເບິ່ງ ຫຼືບໍ່ໄດ້ຍິນຂ່າວສານນີ້ ໃຫ້ທ່ານບອກເຂົາເຈົ້າຕໍ່.
translations.om: Nama dhaamsa kana hubachuu, ilaaluu, yookiin dhaga’uu akka hindandenyee yoo beekte, maalo isaanif himaa.
translations.ru: Если вам известны люди, которые не понимают данное сообщение или не могут увидеть или услышать его, просим вас передать им эту информацию.
translations.zh: 若您知道有人無法了解、看見或聽見本訊息，請將此訊息轉達給他們。
translations.es: Si usted sabe de alguien que es incapaz de comprender, ver o escuchar este mensaje, por favor háblele de esto.
translations.tl: Kung may kilala kayong hindi naiintindihan, nakikita o naririnig itong mensahe, mangyaring sabihin sa kanila ang impormasyong ito.
translations.th: หากท่านรู้จักบุคคลที่ไม่สามารถเข้าใจ มองเห็น หรือได้ยินข้อความนี้ โปรดแจ้งให้พวกเขาทราบเกี่ยวกับเรื่องนี้
translations.vi: Nếu bạn biết có người không hiểu, không xem, hoặc không nghe thông báo này, làm ơn cho họ biết.
translations.pa: ਜੇ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਕਿਸੇ ਨੂੰ ਜਾਣਦੇ ਹੋ, ਜੋ ਇਹ ਸੁਨੇਹਾ ਸਮਝਣ, ਵੇਖਣ ਜਾਂ ਸੁਣਨ ਦੇ ਸਮਰੱਥ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੈ, ਤਾਂ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਉਸ ਨੂੰ ਇਸ ਬਾਰੇ ਦੱਸੋ।
translations.ja: このメッセージが把握できない、見えない、もしくは聞けない人がいる場合は、情報を共有してあげてください。

source.eng: Helpful links:

translations.en: Helpful links:
translations.km: តំណរបណ្តាញដែលមានប្រយោជន៍ ៖
translations.lo: ລິ້ງທີ່ເປັນປໂຍດ:
translations.th: ลิงค์ที่มีประโยชน์:
translations.vi: Các trang mạng liên kết hữu ích:
translations.ja: 役に立つリンク：
